chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. B.A. No.2235 of 2025 (Zeeshan @ Iqbal & others vs. The State) Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz-ul-Hassan Shah For hearing of bail application Date of hearing & order 18.11.2025 Mr. Tariq Ali Khan, advocate for applicant Mr. Qamaruddin Nohari, DPG O R D E R ----- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J:- On spy information applicants were arrested by a police team of Police Station Sohrab Goth on 26.07.2025 from a ground on the back side of Al-Asif Square Sohrab Goth, Karachi and from them respectively 1130 and 1030 grams of charas was recovered. Both the applicants are brothers and it is also alleged that their father was with them but he escaped. 2. Learned counsel for applicants submits that prior to registration of FIR some applications were moved, which show false implication of the applicants and more so their father has been granted pre-arrest bail. 3. His arguments have been opposed by learned DPG. 4. Applicants appear to be prima facie involved in an offence against the Society. Both applicants are brothers and from both of them a huge quantity of charas, more than one kg, has been recovered. The case is fresh one. Recovery of alleged charas is further supported by statements of witnesses u/s 161 Cr PC. The chemical report is also in positive. The case of their father, who has been granted pre-arrest bail is quite different. Therefore, we do not find any merit in this bail application and s accordingly dismiss. However, the trial Court is directed to expedite the trial and conclude it as soon as possible. 5. Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms.

However, the trial Court is directed to expedite the trial and conclude it as soon as possible. 5. Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. JUDGE JUDGE Rafiq/PA.
